title: The basic habit
summary: Keep the story, sources, materials, theme, preview, review, validation, and archive in one local loop.

bullets.title: Start with intent
bullets.body: Choose a presentation, write the brief, add sources, then edit the slides that serve it.

bullets.title: Review every option
bullets.body: Use variants, deck plans, and semantic scaling as proposals.

bullets.title: Ship only checked output
bullets.body: Build, validate, refresh baselines when needed, and update the archive.
